---
name: Propose a New Skill
about: Suggest a new SDLC skill or persona for the toolkit
title: 'skill: [Skill Name]'
labels: enhancement, new-skill
assignees: ''

---

**What is the goal of this skill?**
A clear and concise description of what the skill aims to achieve (e.g., "A skill to analyze React render performance").

**Who is the Persona?**
(e.g., "You are a Frontend Performance Engineer.")

**Why is it needed?**
Why isn't an existing skill sufficient? (e.g., "Currently, `perf-budget` focuses on bundle size, but we need something specifically for React render cycles.")

**Proposed Invocation Command**
(e.g., `/react-render`)
